title: Movie Night
description: Watch videos with friends directly in Minecraft. Build a theater, invite friends, and enjoy shared media experiences together in-game.
body:
[![Discord](https://img.shields.io/badge/Discord-%235865F2.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=discord&logoColor=white)](https://discord.gg/jRSz4AJjAw) [![YouTube](https://img.shields.io/badge/YouTube-%23FF0000.svg?style=for-the-badge&logo=YouTube&logoColor=white)](https://www.youtube.com/@sketch494?sub_confirmation=1) [![Ko-Fi](https://img.shields.io/badge/Ko--fi-F16061?style=for-the-badge&logo=ko-fi&logoColor=white)](https://ko-fi.com/sk3tch)

# **<center>Movie Night Modpack</center>**


![Movie Night Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/cb6b616da332776816b29bcfabfca2d28a6a9524.png)



<center>A modpack that transforms Minecraft into the ultimate movie night experience!</center>

This lightweight modpack adds a fully functional video player, extra building blocks, and optimization mods to enhance your gameplay. Perfect for creating cinematic moments or just chilling with friends in-game!

---

## **<center>What’s This Modpack About?</center>**

- **Video Player**: Play URLs for videos, images, GIFs, and more right inside Minecraft!
- **Building Blocks**: Expand your creative options with new decorative items like dyed pots, chalk, and shingles.
- **Performance Boost**: Enjoy a smoother experience with optimization mods.

Whether you’re building movie theaters or hosting watch parties, this modpack brings a fun, social twist to Minecraft.

---

## **<center>Features</center>**

- **Build Movie Theaters**: Craft immersive spaces with new blocks and a working video frame/projector.
- **Media Playback**: Stream videos, display images, or loop GIFs using URL support.
- **Optimized Gameplay**: Faster rendering and reduced lag for a seamless experience.

<center>Please report bugs related to the modpack itself (not individual mods) via our Discord https://discord.gg/jRSz4AJjAw. Your feedback helps us improve!</center>

---

<details>
<summary>Listed Mods</summary>

- [WorldEdit](https://modrinth.com/plugin/worldedit) by [EngineHub](https://modrinth.com/organization/enginehub) - A powerful in-game Minecraft map editor.
- [ImmediatelyFast](https://modrinth.com/mod/immediatelyfast) by [RaphiMC](https://modrinth.com/user/RaphiMC) - Speeds up immediate mode rendering.
- [Simple Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/plugin/simple-voice-chat) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax) - Proximity voice chat with addon support.
- [Sodium](https://modrinth.com/mod/sodium) by [jellysquid3](https://modrinth.com/user/jellysquid3) - High-performance rendering optimization.
- [WATERMeDIA](https://modrinth.com/mod/watermedia) by [SrRapero720](https://modrinth.com/user/SrRapero720) - Multimedia API using VLC for Minecraft integration.
- [Fabric Language Kotlin](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-language-kotlin) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50) - Enables Kotlin for Fabric mods.
- [FSit](https://modrinth.com/mod/fsit) by [rvbsm](https://modrinth.com/user/rvbsm) - Sit anywhere with this server-side mod!
- [Arts & Crafts](https://modrinth.com/mod/artsandcrafts) by [KekeCreations](https://modrinth.com/user/KekeCreations) - Adds dyed pots, chalk, terracotta shingles, soapstone, and more.
- [SuperMartijn642's Config Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-config-lib) by [SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperMartijn642) - Simplifies config file management.
- [Dynamic FPS](https://modrinth.com/mod/dynamic-fps) by [juliand665](https://modrinth.com/user/juliand665) - Reduces resource usage when idle.
- [Fabric Voice Chat Broadcast](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-voice-chat-broadcast) by [corfoto4](https://modrinth.com/user/corfoto4) - Addon for Simple Voice Chat broadcasting.
- [Entity Culling](https://modrinth.com/mod/entityculling) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) - Hides unseen blocks/entities for better performance.
- [ReplayMod](https://modrinth.com/mod/replaymod) by [Johni0702](https://modrinth.com/user/Johni0702) - Record and relive your Minecraft moments.
- [CreativeCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/creativecore) by [creativemd](https://modrinth.com/user/creativemd) - Core functionality for other mods.
- [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) by [modmuss50](https://modrinth.com/user/modmuss50) - Essential hooks and compatibility for Fabric mods.
- [Iris Shaders](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris) by [coderbot](https://modrinth.com/user/coderbot) - Modern shader support compatible with OptiFine packs.
- [WATERFrAMES](https://modrinth.com/mod/waterframes) by [SrRapero720](https://modrinth.com/user/SrRapero720) - Adds frames and projectors for video/image URLs.
- [Text Placeholder API](https://modrinth.com/mod/placeholder-api) by [Patbox](https://modrinth.com/user/Patbox) - Text manipulation library for mods.
- [Wavey Capes](https://modrinth.com/mod/wavey-capes) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) - Dynamic, flowing capes.
- [Mod Menu](https://modrinth.com/mod/modmenu) by [Terraformers](https://modrinth.com/organization/terraformers) - View your installed mods in-game.
- [SuperMartijn642's Core Lib](https://modrinth.com/mod/supermartijn642s-core-lib) by [SuperMartijn642](https://modrinth.com/user/SuperMartijn642) - Core utilities for cross-version compatibility.
- [FerriteCore](https://modrinth.com/mod/ferrite-core) by [malte0811](https://modrinth.com/user/malte0811) - Memory usage optimizations.
- [Replay Voice Chat](https://modrinth.com/mod/replay-voice-chat) by [henkelmax](https://modrinth.com/user/henkelmax) - Records Simple Voice Chat with ReplayMod.
- [3D Skin Layers](https://modrinth.com/mod/3dskinlayers) by [tr7zw](https://modrinth.com/user/tr7zw) - Renders player skins in 3D.

</details>
